title: selliguea incisocrenata
intro: Selliguea incisocrenata, also known as the incised crested polypody, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Selliguea incisocrenata include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of Asia.
